memberdef.name: R0
memberdef.initializer: do { \ BLK0(i); \ u32 t = Block[(i)]; \ (z) += ((((w) & ((x) ^ (y))) ^ (y)) + t + K0 + RotateLeft32((v), 5U)); \ (w) = RotateLeft32((w), 30U); \ } while (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: < R0, R1, R2, R3, R4 are the different intermediate operations used in SHA1 digest calculation

memberdef.name: R1
memberdef.initializer: do { \ BLK(i); \ u32 t = Block[(i) & 15U]; \ (z) += ((((w) & ((x) ^ (y))) ^ (y)) + t + K0 + RotateLeft32((v), 5U)); \ (w) = RotateLeft32((w), 30U); \ } while (FALSE)

memberdef.name: R2
memberdef.initializer: do { \ BLK(i); \ u32 t = Block[(i) & 15U]; \ (z) += (((w) ^ (x) ^ (y)) + t + K1 + RotateLeft32((v), 5U)); \ (w) = RotateLeft32((w), 30U); \ } while (FALSE)

memberdef.name: R3
memberdef.initializer: do { \ BLK(i); \ u32 t = Block[(i) & 15U]; \ (z) += (((((w) | (x)) & (y)) | ((w) & (x))) + t + K2 + RotateLeft32((v), 5U)); \ (w) = RotateLeft32((w), 30U); \ } while (FALSE)

memberdef.name: R4
memberdef.initializer: do { \ BLK(i); \ u32 t = Block[(i) & 15U]; \ (z) += (((w) ^ (x) ^ (y)) + t + K3 + RotateLeft32((v), 5U)); \ (w) = RotateLeft32((w), 30U); \ } while (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: Macro to Rotate left the 32-bit value.
Multiply 32-bit Len by 8 and store 64-bit result in LenHigh, LenLow.

detaileddescription.para: Make sure ByteNo is between 0 to 3.
This is the core of the algorithm.

listitem.para:
XST_FAILURE In case of failure in SHA1 transform function
XST_SUCCESS In case of success in SHA1 transform function
XST_GLITCH_ERROR In case of glitch detected in SHA1 calculation
Loop unrolled. 80 iteration are unrolled for 4 rounds of 20 operations each.
Set the initial state of the context

briefdescription.para: Read calculated hash from the context and store in user provided memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to memory location where calculated hash to be stored

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS In case of successful read
XST_FAILURE - Upon failure
Check if all bytes are read

briefdescription.para: This function adds padding to data length.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to memory location where Length is to be padded
SHA1 padding length field in bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *const Data, u32 Len, u8 *const Hash)
memberdef.name: XSecure_Sha1Digest

briefdescription.para: This function calculates SHA1 hash on given input data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to memory location where calculated hash to be stored

listitem.para:
XST_FAILURE In case of failure in SHA1 digest calculation
XST_SUCCESS In case of successful calculation of SHA1 digest
XSECURE_SHA1_TRANSFORM_ERROR In case of failure in SHA1 transform operation
XST_GLITCH_ERROR In case of glitch detected in SHA1 calculation
Available bytes for padding in last block

briefdescription.para: This file contains SHA1 driver as per FIPS PUB 180-1.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 mmd 12/20/24 Initial release 5.6 vns 09/27/25 Added error handling for SHA1 transform
